response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, strong open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and architectures, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML modeling — and his German is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang tools
Proven full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of IT architecture design or UML modeling in client consulting context
Career gap and recent short-term roles raise questions about stability and leadership continuity
